name: beehiiv-create-post
description: Create a newsletter post on Beehiiv. Supports draft and confirmed (send immediately) statuses, scheduling, content tags, and LLM-generated content via template interpolation.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path to the Beehiiv API key (e.g. 'beehiiv/api_key').

PUBLICATION_ID.description: Beehiiv publication ID (e.g. 'pub_xxx...'). Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

TITLE.description: Post title (shown in email subject and web). Supports {{key}} template interpolation (e.g. '{{title}}' to pull from an upstream LLM node).

SUBTITLE.description: Post subtitle/preview text. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

BODY_CONTENT.description: HTML content of the post body. Supports {{key}} template interpolation (e.g. '{{content}}' to pipe LLM-generated HTML content directly into the post). Mutually exclusive with BLOCKS — if both are set, BODY_CONTENT takes precedence.

STATUS.description: 'draft' (default): saves the post without sending or scheduling. 'confirmed': sends or schedules the post. Use 'draft' for AI-generated content that needs human review before sending.

SCHEDULED_AT.description: ISO 8601 datetime for scheduled delivery (e.g. '2026-06-01T09:00:00Z'). Only used when STATUS is 'confirmed'. If omitted with STATUS='confirmed', the post sends immediately. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

CONTENT_TAGS.description: Comma-separated content tags for the post (e.g. 'product-update,release-notes'). Used for filtering in the Beehiiv dashboard and analytics.

THUMBNAIL_IMAGE_URL.description: URL for the post's thumbnail image shown in email and web previews. Must be publicly accessible. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

EMAIL_SUBJECT.description: Custom email subject line override. If omitted, Beehiiv uses the post title. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

EMAIL_PREVIEW_TEXT.description: Preview text shown in email clients below the subject line. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

setup_instructions.title: Create a Beehiiv API key
setup_instructions.detail: Log in to https://app.beehiiv.com, navigate to Settings > Integrations > API, and create a new API key.

setup_instructions.title: Store the API key as a Talos secret
setup_instructions.detail: Use set_secret with key_path='beehiiv/api_key' and value='<your-api-key>'.

setup_instructions.title: Find your Publication ID
setup_instructions.detail: Call GET https://api.beehiiv.com/v2/publications with your API key. Copy the 'id' field (pub_xxx...) for your publication.

setup_instructions.title: Recommended: Start with STATUS=draft
setup_instructions.detail: When using LLM-generated content, set STATUS to 'draft' so the post appears in your Beehiiv dashboard for review before sending. Change to 'confirmed' only for fully automated pipelines you trust.
